pr_title: feat(entity-layer): introduce Goal and Objective nodes
author: Person:Henrique Silva
head: henrique/entity-goals-okrs
body:
Adds two new entity labels to the medallion KG: `Goal` and `Objective`. Writer (Neo4jKnowledgeGraphWriter) and the update schemas are extended to emit them. Navigator reads are already label-agnostic.

Does **not** update downstream consumers in `alia_medallion.infra.agents.*` — those still assume the old Person/Project-only entity shape. Will need a follow-up.

Last commit before I hand off — sorry about the rush. I'll be available on Slack this week for questions.

reviews.note: Shipping before I leave — follow-up for agent integration.
